## Summary

Describe the content you want to add or improve.

## Area

- [ ] Identity
- [ ] Endpoint
- [ ] Email
- [ ] Cloud
- [ ] Network
- [ ] Metrics
- [ ] MITRE mapping
- [ ] Process guidance
- [ ] Other

## Intended audience

Who should use this content?

## Operational value

What problem does this solve for analysts, engineers, or reviewers?

## Required sources or fields

List any logs, fields, tools, or references needed to make the content useful.

## Review notes

Add any safety, privacy, quality, or validation notes.
